description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New

Search images by their content with image classification and OCR (Mac only, new downloads)

Redesigned forward messages dialog

Option to disable link previews in outgoing messages
Fixed & Improved

iMessage: Chat selection now switches immediately when Beeper changes chats

Improved image loading performance

Fixed composer state for bridges that don't advertise link preview support

Fixed disconnect banner showing in unrelated spaces

Fixed account display name not using profile name

Fixed custom emoji reaction images not updating correctly when toggling or removing reactions

Fixed On-Device Facebook connections sometimes missing messages from marketplace chats

Turned off using data export requests for On-Device Telegram connections

Upgraded networks with many assorted fixes
